name: GridItem
description: Place and align an item within a GridLayout cell, including row/column spanning.

as.description: Renders the grid item as a semantic HTML element instead of a div.

colSpan.description: Sets how many grid columns the item spans.

rowSpan.description: Sets how many grid rows the item spans.

horizontalAlignment.description: Aligns the item within its cell along the inline axis.

verticalAlignment.description: Aligns the item within its cell along the block axis.

margin.description: Sets outer spacing around the grid item.

padding.description: Sets inner spacing inside the grid item.

slots.children: Content rendered inside the grid item.

accessibility.role: varies by `as` element and surrounding layout semantics
aria: Prefer semantic HTML via `as` when structure matters
Apply ARIA attributes based on the rendered element and overall UI pattern

inside: GridLayout examples that require per-item spanning or alignment
